name: Carrot Stuffed Cabbage Leaves
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups raw carrots, scrubbed and finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove cabbage core from the head of cabbage.
2. Place the cabbage in a pot of boiling water, bring to full boil, then remove from heat.
3. Allow the cabbage to sit in covered pot for about 20 minutes, drain, and allow it to cool. (Reserve some cooking water.)
4. Peel off 16 large leaves from the cooled cabbage.
5. Trim any coarse center ribs from each leaf.
6. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, sauté until clear but not brown.
7. Add grated carrots, cooked mashed potatoes, raisins, parsley, salt, and pepper to the pan with onions and garlic. Mix well.
8. Spoon the mixture into the center of each cabbage leaf.
9. Fold the edges of the leaf over the stuffing (envelope style) and roll tightly into cigar shapes, securing with wooden toothpicks.
10. Arrange the stuffed leaves in two layers at the bottom of a deep, flame-proof dish.
11. Pour carrot or tomato juice over the stuffed leaves, cover, and simmer for half an hour. Add more liquid if needed.
Total calories per serving: 363
Fat: 5 grams
